intended_use: MEDIHUB PROSTATE is an image processing software package that performs outlining, processing, viewing, and editing of prostate MR images. The software can support study review and analysis of prostate
intended_use_full: MEDIHUB PROSTATE is an image processing software package that performs outlining, processing, viewing, and editing of prostate MR images. The software can support study review and analysis of prostate MR data with computed modules. The analysis result can be presented in various formats, including images overlaid onto source MR images and a structured report. MEDIHUB PROSTATE semi-automatically outlines the prostate based on MR images by contour, and it requires the user to edit with image manipulating tools and confirm the final result. The package provides additional functionalities including registered multiparametric-MRI viewing and combining MR sequences into a single image to support visualization. Edited PI-RADS report and semi annotated prostate region can be viewed in each single image in the final report. MEDIHUB PROSTATE is intended to be used by trained radiologists and urologists. Patient management decisions should not be made solely based on the analysis performed by MEDIHUB PROSTATE.
ground_truth: Ground truth produced by consensus annotation of three expert radiologists using majority rule approach
other_metrics: Dice coefficient: 0.928 (95% CI: [0.925, 0.931]) for stand-alone algorithm performance on 114 T2 MR images; Hausdorff distance: 2.171 (95% CI: [1.097, 3.245]); Mean Dice coefficients for all three test datasets exceeded pass/fail criterion of 0.894; Reader performance improvements with algorithm assistance: 0.156, 0.011, and 0.008 Dice coefficient improvements for three radiologists respectively
